name: Welcome to AndrewWayne’s website
tagline: 欢迎来到小黑装逼网站
body:
### Welcome to Andrew's Pages.
I will show my documents on these pages, such as my passage, or my Classmates' exam mark. I'll also show our project on these website and you can git them on my github. 

### This is a website for Children, Coders, Teenagers.
I'm AndrewWayne. I'm from China. I was born in 2003. All in all, I learn English, Math, Physics, Social well. So you can ask me questions by QQ, twitter even email.

### I'm just a noob, so I'm welcome the advice from Ghosts(各路大神).
I will thank your suggestion very much.

### My QQ,Twitter,Google account and my telephone number
QQ:[965296197](http://user.qzone.qq.com/965296197/)
Twitter:[AndrewWayne](https://twitter.com/AndrewWayne2003)
Google:*AndrewWayne2016@gmail.com*
### At last, can you share this website with your friends?
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
